entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: Cicer arietinum L., the crop studied for resistance to pests

entities.name: HELICOVERPA ARMIGERA
entities.description: A lepidopteran pest that feeds on chickpea larvae

entities.name: RESISTANCE TO HELICOVERPA ARMIGERA
entities.description: The ability of chickpea genotypes to resist attack by H. armigera

entities.name: INHIBITION OF LARVAL GROWTH
entities.description: The reduction in growth of H. armigera larvae as a result of host plant factors

entities.name: FEEDING TEST
entities.description: An experimental procedure used to evaluate larval growth on chickpea leaves

entities.name: HIGH-PERFORMANCE LIQUID CHROMATOGRAPHY
entities.description: An analytical technique used to identify and quantify acid components in leaf exudates

entities.name: OXALIC ACID
entities.description: A water-soluble acid found in leaf exudates that inhibits the growth of H. armigera larvae

entities.name: MALIC ACID
entities.description: An acid found in leaf exudates that does not affect the growth of H. armigera larvae

entities.name: LEAF EXUDATE
entities.description: Substances secreted on the surface of chickpea leaves

entities.name: ANTIBIOSIS
entities.description: A mechanism of resistance where a substance adversely affects the life cycle of a pest

entities.name: ANTIFEEDANT EFFECTS
entities.description: A mechanism of resistance where a substance discourages a pest from feeding

entities.name: SEMI-ARTIFICIAL DIET
entities.description: A medium used to test the specific effect of oxalic acid on larval growth
